statDef.label: Extra vore capacity
statDef.description: Extra vore capacity added to the pawn's base capacity when calculating how many pawns they can have inside them.

statDef.label: Vore body size multiple
statDef.description: Multiplies the pawn's body size for the purposes of calculating how many pawns they can have inside them. This is used for making certain pawns more or less effective at holding prey based on their body size.
